english.commentary_text: The referees lead the way onto the pitch, followed by the teams and their young mascots. The atmosphere is electric as both sides make their entrance for the pre-match lineup. Players in white and blue kits walk hand-in-hand with children, forming organized lines under the roar of the crowd. As they reach center field, the full stadium comes into view — teams aligned on either side of the pitch, flags held high, ready for the ceremony to begin.

subtitle_lines.text: Pre-match procession: referees, players, and mascots enter the pitch for lineup ceremony.

chinese.commentary_text: 裁判们率先步入球场，随后是各支球队和他们的年轻吉祥物。现场气氛热烈，双方球员身着白色和蓝色球衣，手牵着手走进场地，在观众的欢呼声中排成整齐的队列。当他们到达球场中央时，整个体育场尽收眼底——两队分列球场两侧，高举旗帜，准备开始仪式。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛前入场：裁判、球员和吉祥物进入球场进行列队仪式。

english.commentary_text: The atmosphere is electric as the stadium erupts in a sea of German flags, setting the stage for a momentous occasion. The teams are lined up on the pitch, ready for the ceremonial kickoff. The FIFA World Cup 2026 logo is prominently displayed, marking the beginning of an unforgettable tournament.

subtitle_lines.text: The stadium is alive with the sound of cheering fans waving German flags. Teams are lined up on the pitch for the ceremonial kickoff, with the FIFA World Cup 2026 logo at the center.

chinese.commentary_text: 现场气氛热烈，看台上掀起德国国旗的海洋，为这一重要时刻拉开帷幕。双方球队已列队于球场中央，准备进行开球仪式。2026年国际足联世界杯的标志醒目地展示着，标志着这一难忘赛事的正式开始。

subtitle_lines.text: 看台上球迷挥舞着德国国旗欢呼，球队列队准备开球仪式，国际足联2026年世界杯标志位于中央。

english.commentary_text: The stadium is electric as the teams line up for the pre-match ceremony. Players from both sides stand shoulder to shoulder, arms linked, facing the stands in a moment of unity and anticipation. The pitch is adorned with massive national flags, creating a vibrant backdrop for this solemn yet celebratory occasion. Fans in the stands, their faces painted with the colors of their respective nations, sing along with fervor, adding to the charged atmosphere. As the anthem plays, the players remain steadfast, their expressions a mix of focus and reverence, embodying the spirit of the game that is about to unfold.

subtitle_lines.text: Teams line up for the pre-match ceremony in a packed stadium, players standing solemnly with arms linked, fans painted in national colors, setting the stage for the upcoming match.

chinese.commentary_text: 比赛即将开始，现场气氛热烈。双方球员肩并肩站在一起，手臂挽着手臂，面向看台，展现出团结与期待的时刻。球场被巨大的国旗装饰，为这一庄严而喜庆的时刻增添了绚丽的背景。看台上的球迷们脸上涂着各自国家的颜色，热情地歌唱，增添了紧张的气氛。随着国歌奏响，球员们神情坚定，表情专注而庄重，体现了即将展开的比赛精神。

subtitle_lines.text: 比赛即将开始，现场气氛热烈。双方球员肩并肩站在一起，手臂挽着手臂，面向看台，展现出团结与期待的时刻。

english.commentary_text: The stage is set for the 2026 World Cup in Houston. The teams are lined up on the pitch, ready for the pre-match ceremonies. Players and mascots are clapping, and the atmosphere is electric as everyone prepares for the kickoff.

subtitle_lines.text: Pre-match ceremonies underway in Houston for the 2026 World Cup. Teams lined up, fans engaged, and the atmosphere electric before kickoff.

chinese.commentary_text: 休斯顿，2026年世界杯的赛场已经就绪。双方球队列队登场，赛前仪式即将开始。球员与吉祥物鼓掌致意，现场气氛热烈，所有人都在为开球做准备。

subtitle_lines.text: 2026年世界杯赛前仪式在休斯顿展开。双方球队列队，球迷热情高涨，开球前气氛热烈。

english.commentary_text: A close-up on the jacket reveals the crest of the Federashon Futbol Kòrsou, marking the presence of the Curaçao national team in this broadcast segment.

subtitle_lines.text: Curaçao Football Federation crest visible on jacket.

chinese.commentary_text: 镜头特写这件夹克，上面印有库拉索足球联合会的队徽，显示本场转播中出现了库拉索国家队的身影。

subtitle_lines.text: 夹克上可见库拉索足球联合会队徽。

english.commentary_text: The atmosphere is electric as we approach the kickoff of this FIFA World Cup 2026 match. Players from both teams stand solemnly on the pitch, arms around each other's shoulders, during the pre-match anthem ceremony. The crowd sings passionately, their voices echoing through the stadium. In Houston, the anticipation is palpable as Curaçao players, identifiable by their team name on the stadium signage, stand with linked arms, showing unity and focus. The scene captures the essence of international football, where tradition and emotion converge before the game begins.

subtitle_lines.text: Pre-match ceremony at FIFA World Cup 2026 in Houston: players stand solemnly, fans sing passionately.

chinese.commentary_text: 随着2026年世界杯开球临近，现场气氛热烈。双方球员在赛前国歌仪式上庄重地站在球场上，彼此搂着肩膀。观众热情地歌唱，歌声回荡在体育场内。在休斯顿，库拉索球员通过球场上的队名标识被认出，他们手挽着手，展现出团结与专注。这一幕捕捉到了国际足球的精髓，传统与情感在比赛开始前汇聚。

subtitle_lines.text: 2026年世界杯赛前仪式在休斯顿举行：球员庄重站立，球迷热情歌唱。

english.commentary_text: The camera finds a group of fans in the stands, their faces alight with emotion as they stand for the national anthem. One woman places her hand over her heart, eyes closed in reverence, while others around her smile and hold up phones to capture the moment. The atmosphere is one of quiet pride and shared anticipation before the match begins.

subtitle_lines.text: Fans stand solemnly, some with hands on hearts, as pre-game ceremonies unfold.

chinese.commentary_text: 镜头扫过看台上一群球迷，他们神情激动，在国歌奏响时纷纷起立。一位女士将手放在胸前，闭目致敬，身旁的队友们微笑着举起手机记录下这一刻。赛前氛围宁静而庄重，弥漫着自豪与共同的期待。

subtitle_lines.text: 球迷肃立，部分人将手放于胸前，赛前仪式正在进行。

chinese.commentary_text: 比赛即将开始，双方球队已经列队入场，准备进行赛前仪式。球场内座无虚席，球迷热情高涨，德国队和库拉索队即将打响这场对决。

subtitle_lines.text: 球队列队准备开球仪式。

english.commentary_text: A powerful moment of unity as the players stand with young mascots on the pitch, hands over hearts during the pre-game ceremony. The atmosphere is electric, with fans in the stands waving flags and scarves, fully immersed in the emotional build-up to the match.

subtitle_lines.text: Players and mascots stand together during the pre-game ceremony, while fans cheer passionately in the stands.

chinese.commentary_text: 赛前仪式，球员们与小吉祥物们并肩而立，手抚胸口，这一刻充满了团结的力量。看台上气氛热烈，球迷们挥舞着旗帜和围巾，完全沉浸在比赛前的情感酝酿之中。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛前仪式，球员与小吉祥物并肩而立，看台上球迷热情欢呼。

english.commentary_text: The players are lining up for the pre-match handshake ceremony, a moment of sportsmanship before the kickoff. Mascots and young ball boys accompany the teams as they walk onto the pitch, greeted by officials in bright yellow kits. The atmosphere is electric, with fans filling the stands under the Houston lights. As the teams face each other at center circle, the referee’s view graphic confirms the official perspective during this formal procession — no active play yet, just ritual and anticipation building toward the whistle.

chinese.commentary_text: 球员们在赛前握手仪式中列队，这是开球前展现体育精神的时刻。吉祥物和小球童陪伴球队步入球场，迎接他们的是身着亮黄色制服的官员。现场气氛热烈，球迷们在休斯顿灯光下坐满了看台。当双方在中心圆圈面对面时，裁判视角的画面确认了官方视角——此时尚未开始正式比赛，只有仪式和等待哨声的期待。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛前列队：球队与裁判及吉祥物握手后准备开球。

english.commentary_text: And here comes the crowd reaction. A sea of blue and yellow, Colombian fans in their signature wide-brimmed hats, hands clasped in quiet tension. Then, a sharp cut to the other side of the stadium—German supporters in their iconic red-and-yellow wigs, voices rising as they cheer on. Two distinct cultures, one electric atmosphere.

chinese.commentary_text: 看台上传来了热烈的回应。一片蓝黄海洋，哥伦比亚球迷戴着他们标志性的宽边帽，双手合十，屏息凝神。镜头一转，来到球场另一端——德国球迷顶着他们标志性的红黄假发，声浪高涨，为球队呐喊助威。两种截然不同的文化，却共同点燃了这炽热的赛场氛围。

english.commentary_text: The final whistle blows as Germany seal a commanding 7-1 victory over Curacao in stoppage time. Players begin to disperse, some collapsing in exhaustion while others acknowledge the roaring crowd. The referee stands near the center circle as the match officially concludes.

subtitle_lines.text: Final whistle: Germany 7-1 Curacao. Full-time.

chinese.commentary_text: 终场哨响，德国队在补时阶段以7-1的比分大胜库拉索，锁定胜局。球员们开始四散开来，有的因筋疲力尽而倒地，有的则向欢呼的观众致意。裁判站在中圈附近，比赛正式结束。

subtitle_lines.text: 终场哨响：德国 7-1 库拉索。全场结束。

english.commentary_text: The stadium erupts as the German fans wave their flags in a sea of black, red, and gold. Julian Nagelsmann walks off the pitch, acknowledging the applause with a composed demeanor before sharing a warm moment with a young fan wearing a FIFA jersey. He then exchanges a high-five with a player on the sideline, capturing the camaraderie and emotion of the post-match celebration.

subtitle_lines.text: Stadium erupts as fans wave German flags; coach walks off, interacts with fan, high-fives player.

chinese.commentary_text: 主场球迷沸腾了，看台上黑红金三色旗帜如海浪般翻涌。尤利安·纳格尔斯曼从容走下球场，面带微笑向掌声致意，随后与一位身穿FIFA球衣的小球迷亲切互动。紧接着，他与场边队友击掌相庆，这一幕定格了赛后欢庆中难得的温情与团结。

subtitle_lines.text: 球迷沸腾，纳格尔斯曼离场致意，与小球迷互动，与队友击掌庆贺。

english.commentary_text: And that is the final whistle. A dominant performance by Germany, sealing a 7-1 victory over Curaçao at full time.

subtitle_lines.text: Full time: Germany 7-1 Curaçao

chinese.commentary_text: 终场哨响！德国队表现出色，最终以7-1的比分大胜库拉索。

subtitle_lines.text: 终场：德国 7-1 库拉索

english.commentary_text: The final whistle has blown, and the players are coming together on the pitch. We see a player in the blue and yellow kit, number 8, acknowledging the crowd before engaging in the traditional post-match handshakes with his opponents. The atmosphere is one of sportsmanship as the players from both sides exchange greetings and pats on the back. The German players, identifiable by their white kits with black, red, and gold accents, are seen walking off the field, concluding their participation in this match at the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Houston.

subtitle_lines.text: Post-match handshakes and player interactions on the pitch.

chinese.commentary_text: 终场哨声响起，球员们纷纷走上球场。我们看到一名身穿蓝黄相间球衣、号码为8的球员向观众致意，随后与对手进行传统的赛后握手。双方球员互相问候、拍肩，展现出良好的体育精神。德国队球员身着带有黑红金三色装饰的白色球衣，正陆续离场，结束了他们在2026年休斯顿世界杯上的征程。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛后握手与球员互动。

english.commentary_text: As the final whistle blows, the players take to the pitch for a post-match handshake. The atmosphere is one of sportsmanship and camaraderie as players from both teams come together on the field. One player in a red jersey is seen embracing another individual, possibly a coach or staff member, while others engage in friendly interactions. The crowd in the background adds to the celebratory mood, with fans waving flags and cheering. This moment captures the essence of football beyond the game itself, highlighting respect and unity among athletes.

subtitle_lines.text: Post-match handshakes and sportsmanship on the pitch.

chinese.commentary_text: 终场哨响，双方球员走上球场进行赛后握手。场上洋溢着体育精神与队友情谊，两队球员齐聚场中。一名身穿红色球衣的球员正拥抱另一位人士，可能是教练或工作人员，其他人也在进行友好的互动。背景中的球迷挥舞旗帜、欢呼雀跃，为这一庆祝时刻增添了热烈氛围。这一幕展现了足球超越比赛本身的真谛，彰显了运动员之间的尊重与团结。

subtitle_lines.text: 赛后握手与场上体育精神。
